samples.input: I want to clone mScarlet into pAAV CAG GFP, in place of the GFP. I have obtained plasmids 131001 and 37825 from Addgene. Which of the following approaches is most likely to work?
choices: Cut plasmid 37825 with HindIII and Nco1 and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Cut plasmid 37825 with HindIII and BamHI and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCGCCACCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Cut plasmid 37825 with EcoRI and BamHI and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Cut plasmid 37825 with EcoRI and HindIII and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCGCCACCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Cut plasmid 37825 with EcoRI and Nco1 and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCGCCACCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.
Insufficient information to answer the question.

Cut plasmid 37825 with EcoRI and BamHI and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCGCCACCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Cut plasmid 37825 with HindIII and BamHI and purify the long fragment. PCR plasmid 131001 with primers CATCATTTTGGCAAAGAATTGGATCCATGGTGAGCAAGG and ATCGATAAGCTTGATATCGAATTCTCACTTGTACAGCTCGTCCATG and purify the resulting band. Perform Gibson assembly with the two fragments.

Question: I want to clone mScarlet into pAAV CAG GFP, in place of the GFP. I have obtained plasmids 131001 and 37825 from Addgene. Which of the following approaches is most likely to work?
Options:
